docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,060.00 FILED BY CHAO, ELISA AS TO DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CHAO, ELISA STONICH, FRANK
ORDER THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-20-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
FILED DECLARATIONS OF ELISA CHAO AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLRATION RE REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAO, ELISA AS TO DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2018 BY ANDREA MCGARY; PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM; BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT THEY ARE SWORN AND TESTIFIED ON THEIR OWN BEHALF, PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT ARE RETAINED; JPT: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE COURT ENTERS SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHAO, ELISA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED FEB-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAO, ELISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK $2,060.00 PRINCIPAL, $146.74 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,256.74, PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT CHAO'S ASSERTED "BUSINESS INTERRUPTION , LOSS OF USE REVENUE OR PROFIT" DAMAGES ARE NON-RECOVERABLE PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' "HOME STAGING SERVICE AND RENTAL AGREEMENT" WHICH EXCLUDES SUCH DAMAGE CATEGORIES. INTEREST AWARDED FROM OCTOBER 20, 2017 TO JULY 16, 2018 (260 DAYS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,458.88 FILED BY STONICH, FRANK AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHAO, ELISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT STONICH, FRANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-20-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT STONICH, FRANK RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT CHAO, ELISA $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, THIS AWARD INCLUDES RECOVERY FOR LARGE HOLE REPAIR AND EXCLUDES RECOVERY FOR SMALL HOLE DAMAGES ASSERTED PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' "HOME STAGING SERVICE AND RENTAL AGREEMENT" CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
